svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light;

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 274px; height: 1px; padding-top: 69px; margin-left: 158px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #A3EA2A;
display: inline-block; font-size: 14px; font-family: "Source Sans Pro"; color: #A3EA2A; line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
1. Prepares an infected USB device
2. Sends it as a "present" via delivery

div.div:

span.style: color: light-dark(rgb(163, 234, 42), rgb(25, 86, 0)); font-style: normal; font-variant-ligatures: normal; font-variant-caps: normal; font-weight: 400; letter-spacing: normal; orphans: 2; text-indent: 0px; text-transform: none; widows: 2; word-spacing: 0px; -webkit-text-stroke-width: 0px; white-space: nowrap; text-decoration-thickness: initial; text-decoration-style: initial; text-decoration-color: initial; float: none; display: inline !important;

br.style: forced-color-adjust: none; padding: 0px; margin: 0px; color: light-dark(rgb(163, 234, 42), rgb(25, 86, 0)); font-style: normal; font-variant-ligatures: normal; font-variant-caps: normal; font-weight: 400; letter-spacing: normal; orphans: 2; text-indent: 0px; text-transform: none; widows: 2; word-spacing: 0px; -webkit-text-stroke-width: 0px; white-space: nowrap; text-decoration-thickness: initial; text-decoration-style: initial; text-decoration-color: initial;
